execute_steps: code_review: read resources/pi/agent/extensions/bridge/index.ts lines 15-42
verify state machine: state starts as 'Disconnected', sync() sets to 'Syncing', on success sets to 'Ready'
verify retry: catch block in sync() calls setTimeout(sync, 2000) for reconnect, retryCount increments, max 30 retries
verify onDisconnect: api.on('disconnect', () => { state = 'Disconnected'; sync() }) triggers reconnect
test_execution.evidence: bridge/index.ts: state machine implemented with 3 states (Disconnected/Syncing/Ready). sync() method at line 23 uses try/catch with retry on failure. onDisconnect at line 40 resets state and calls sync(). No automated e2e test (requires live pi process). Verified by code review + BLR v5 pass
